overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a misty autumn swamp and forest. The character traverses stone ruins, crosses a bridge over water, and approaches a wooden hut in a sunlit clearing.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty swamp path with stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through misty swamp along narrow dirt path bordered by stone walls

entered.detail: moss-covered stone wall ruins lining the left side of the path
weathered wooden posts and rails forming a fence on the right
white-barked birch trees with sparse autumn leaves
low-lying fog and mist hanging between trees in the distance
stagnant swamp water visible through the trees on the left

segments.scene_description: Walking through a misty autumn swamp with stone ruins on the left and wooden fence posts on the right. Birch trees line the path while fog hangs in the distance, creating a hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside path with stone bridge crossing

events.description: crossing stone bridge over creek, transitioning from swamp to riverside
passing wooden signpost indicating direction, mist clears significantly

agents.ego_description: crossing a stone bridge over a creek and continuing along the riverside path

entered.detail: low stone bridge with mossy rocks crossing over water
clear flowing creek running parallel to the path on the right
tall golden reeds and grasses growing along the water's edge
weathered wooden signpost with directional markings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a stone bridge over a creek, leaving the misty swamp behind. The path continues alongside the water through tall golden reeds, with a wooden signpost visible on the right as the fog clears.

events.description: wooden hut becomes visible on hillside ahead, entering clearing

agents.ego_description: walking uphill toward a wooden hut in a sunlit forest clearing

entered.detail: traditional wooden hut with thatched roof on rocky hillside
rustic wooden fence made of rough-hewn logs
tall evergreen pine trees mixed with birch on the hillside
large moss-covered boulders and rocky outcrops

segments.scene_description: Walking up a hill through a sunlit clearing toward a traditional wooden hut with a thatched roof. The path is bordered by wooden fences and stone outcrops, with pine trees replacing the earlier birch forest as the destination approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty autumn swamp that gradually opens into a sunlit forest clearing. It begins by navigating a hazy path lined with birch trees, passing stone ruins and wooden fence posts shrouded in dense fog. As the camera crosses a stone bridge over a creek, the mist clears to reveal tall golden reeds and a wooden signpost along the water's edge. The scene then shifts as the path ascends a hill, where the birch forest gives way to pine trees and the lighting transforms into bright sunlight. Finally, the movement leads through a clearing bordered by stone outcrops and fences toward a traditional thatched-roof wooden hut.
